title: Document arrived: Q3-2025 Quarterly Filing — Meridian Logistics SA
detail: 3 pages · dated 2025-11-10 · Sentinel waking up

title: Planning
detail: Sentinel drafts its investigation plan

title: Investigation plan
detail: Determine if Q3-2025 triggers covenant breach, liquidity crisis, or revolver misuse under the EUR 40M facility.

payload.goal: Determine if Q3-2025 triggers covenant breach, liquidity crisis, or revolver misuse under the EUR 40M facility.
steps: Calculate net debt/EBITDA, interest cover, and liquidity covenants from Q3 figures.
Verify the EUR 2.8M revolver drawing for Nordvolt against permitted capex and facility limits.
Stress-test EUR 3.8M liquidity against scheduled principal and interest payments.
Assess Q4 covenant headroom impact from the EUR 1.2M litigation hit and EUR 0.8M contract loss.
Confirm prior disclosure of the Aurora settlement and check for residual contingent liabilities.
Validate Nordvolt is not a related party and that the purchase complies with negative covenants.

title: Investigating
detail: Multi-step evidence gathering: documents, ratios, ledger

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: I need to verify the exact covenant thresholds from the executed facility documentation before computing ratios. The filing mentions Net Debt EUR 81,400k, LTM EBITDA EUR 22,000k, LTM interest EUR 4,600k, and liquidity EUR 3,800k. I should first search for the leverage ratio and interest cover covenant thresholds in the credit agreement.

title: search_documents
detail: {"query":"leverage ratio covenant threshold Net Debt EBITDA","docType":"credit-agreement-2023"}

args.query: leverage ratio covenant threshold Net Debt EBITDA

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: I found the leverage threshold (3.50:1.00) on page 7, but I need the full Section 7.1 to capture the Debt Service Coverage threshold and any liquidity covenant. I must read the exact clause before computing ratios.

 "docId": "credit-agreement-2023",
 "docTitle": "Senior Facilities Agreement (2023)",

 "heading": "SECTION 7.1 — FINANCIAL COVENANTS",
 "text": "SECTION 7.1 — FINANCIAL COVENANTS\n\n7.1(a) Leverage. The Borrower shall ensure that the Leverage Ratio in respect of any Measurement Period ending on or after 30 June 2023 does not exceed 3.50:1.00.\n\n7.1(b) Debt Service Coverage. The Borr …[truncated 412 chars]

payload.heading: SECTION 7.1 — FINANCIAL COVENANTS
payload.text:
SECTION 7.1 — FINANCIAL COVENANTS

7.1(a) Leverage. The Borrower shall ensure that the Leverage Ratio in respect of any Measurement Period ending on or after 30 June 2023 does not exceed 3.50:1.00.

7.1(b) Debt Service Coverage. The Borrower shall ensure that the ratio of Consolidated EBITDA to Debt Service in respect of any Measurement Period is not less than 1.25:1.00.

The financial covenants in this Section 7.1 shall be tested quarterly by reference to each Measurement Period ending on the last day of each Financial Quarter, on the basis of the quarterly financial statements and the related Compliance Certificate.

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: I have verified the leverage threshold (≤3.50:1.00) and DSCR threshold (≥1.25:1.00) on page 7 of the credit agreement. The Q3-2025 filing shows Net Debt of EUR 81,400k and LTM EBITDA of EUR 22,000k, which suggests potential leverage covenant pressure, but I must not compute manually. I will now call the deterministic calculator for the leverage ratio for Q3-2025.

title: calc_ratio
detail: {"metric":"leverage","quarter":"Q3-2025"}

title: calc_ratio → result
Sentinel reasons
detail: Leverage ratio is 3.7x, breaching the 3.50:1.00 threshold from page 7. I must now compute the DSCR for Q3-2025 to determine if there is a second breach. After that, I will query the ledger for the exceptional items (legal settlement, capex, contract loss) to attribute causes before drafting the memo.

title: calc_ratio
detail: {"metric":"dscr","quarter":"Q3-2025"}

title: calc_ratio → result

payload.formula: Consolidated EBITDA (LTM) / (LTM interest paid + LTM scheduled principal)

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: Leverage ratio is 3.7x, breaching the 3.50x threshold on page 7. DSCR is 2.56x, compliant. To attribute the causes of the leverage deterioration before drafting the memo, I need to query the Q3-2025 ledger for the exceptional legal settlement and the revolver-funded capex. I will start with the legal settlement entry referenced in the filing.

title: query_ledger
detail: {"category":"legal","minAbsAmountEur":1000000,"dateFrom":"2025-07-01","dateTo":"2025-09-30","contains":"LEGAL-SETTLE"}

title: query_ledger → result
Sentinel reasons
detail: Leverage is 3.7x (breach of 3.50x on page 7); DSCR is 2.56x (compliant). I have confirmed the EUR 1.2M legal settlement in the ledger. Next I need to trace the EUR 2.8M Nordvolt capex/revolver drawing in the ledger to attribute the debt increase, then I will have enough evidence to draft the memo.

title: query_ledger
detail: {"category":"capex","minAbsAmountEur":2000000,"dateFrom":"2025-07-01","dateTo":"2025-09-30","contains":"EQUIP-PURCH"}

title: query_ledger → result
Sentinel reasons
detail: I have verified the covenant thresholds on page 7 (leverage ≤3.50x, DSCR ≥1.25x), computed the ratios (leverage 3.7x breach; DSCR 2.56x compliant), and traced the two primary causes in the ledger: the EUR 1.2M Aurora litigation settlement (LEGAL-SETTLE-0847) and the EUR 2.8M Nordvolt capex purchase (EQUIP-PURCH-0912) funded by a revolver drawing that increased gross debt. Liquidity fell to EUR 3,800k. I have sufficient evidence to draft an escalation-grade memo without chasing secondary clauses now.

title: Drafting memo
detail: Writing memo from the investigation log

title: Draft memo: BREACH
detail: 5 findings · 7/9 citations verified verbatim

payload.title: Covenant Monitoring Memo — Meridian Logistics SA Q3-2025
payload.summary: Q3-2025 leverage is 3.70x, breaching the 3.50:1.00 ceiling. DSCR remains compliant at 2.56x. The breach is driven by a EUR 1.2M litigation settlement and a EUR 2.8M revolver-funded capex purchase that increased gross debt to EUR 85.2M, while liquidity fell to EUR 3.8M. Both exceptional items are confirmed in the ledger.

findings.text: Total Net Debt of EUR 81,400 thousand and LTM EBITDA of EUR 22,000 thousand produce a Leverage Ratio of 3.70x, breaching the 3.50:1.00 ceiling.

citations.quote: The Borrower shall ensure that the Leverage Ratio in respect of any Measurement Period ending on or after 30 June 2023 does not exceed 3.50:1.00.
Total net debt: EUR 81,400 thousand

findings.text: Debt Service Coverage is 2.56x, above the 1.25:1.00 minimum.

citations.quote: The Borrower shall ensure that the ratio of Consolidated EBITDA to Debt Service in respect of any Measurement Period is not less than 1.25:1.00.
LTM EBITDA (last twelve months): EUR 22,000 thousand

findings.text: The EUR 1.2M Aurora settlement reduced earnings and is confirmed in the ledger.

citations.quote: the Group recognised a EUR 1,200 thousand charge in operating expenses in connection with the final settlement of the Aurora Freight SARL litigation (payment reference LEGAL-SETTLE-0847, August 2025).
Settlement — Aurora Freight SARL litigation (final)

findings.text: The EUR 2.8M Nordvolt capex was funded by a Revolving Facility drawing, increasing gross debt.

citations.quote: the Group accelerated its fleet electrification programme with the purchase of twelve electric trucks and associated charging infrastructure from Nordvolt Fleet Systems for EUR 2,800 thousand (reference EQUIP-PURCH-0912), funded through a drawing under the Revolving Facility in September 2025.
Purchase — 12 electric trucks + charging infrastructure

findings.text: Quarter-end liquidity fell to EUR 3,800 thousand.

citations.quote: quarter-end liquidity decreased to EUR 3,800 thousand

flaggedTransactions.cause: Final settlement of Aurora Freight SARL litigation
Purchase of 12 electric trucks and charging infrastructure from Nordvolt Fleet Systems funded by revolver drawing

payload.recommendation: Escalate to the credit committee immediately. The borrower is in covenant breach with leverage at 3.70x. Waive or cure must be negotiated before the next test date. Verify that the Nordvolt capex falls within permitted uses and that no additional drawings are made without committee approval. Monitor Q4-2025 recovery assumptions closely.

title: The Skeptic reviews (round 1)
detail: Adversarial internal challenge before anything reaches a human

title: Objection OBJ-1: Threshold basis — Amendment Agreement
detail: The investigation log does not verify whether any Amendment Agreement modifies the covenant thresholds in the original credit agreement. The memo relies solely on page 7 of the 2023 agreement, but amendments prevail over the original. Without checking for an amendment, the threshold basis is unverified.

payload.objection: The investigation log does not verify whether any Amendment Agreement modifies the covenant thresholds in the original credit agreement. The memo relies solely on page 7 of the 2023 agreement, but amendments prevail over the original. Without checking for an amendment, the threshold basis is unverified.
payload.requiredAction: Search for any Amendment Agreement to the Senior Facilities Agreement (2023) and confirm whether the leverage or DSCR thresholds have been modified. If an amendment exists, re-compute ratios against the amended thresholds.

title: Objection OBJ-2: Citations — ledger pages not verified
detail: The memo cites 'ledger-legal' and 'ledger-capex' as sources for quotes, but the investigation log shows these were returned from query_ledger calls, not from reading a specific page of a document. The citations are marked 'verified: false' in the memo, meaning the quotes are not confirmed to come from a page actually read. This fails the citations checklist point.

payload.objection: The memo cites 'ledger-legal' and 'ledger-capex' as sources for quotes, but the investigation log shows these were returned from query_ledger calls, not from reading a specific page of a document. The citations are marked 'verified: false' in the memo, meaning the quotes are not confirmed to come from a page actually read. This fails the citations checklist point.
payload.requiredAction: Re-run the ledger queries and capture the exact page or document reference for each entry, or remove the unverified citations and rely only on the filing and agreement pages that were actually read.

title: Resolving objections
detail: Sentinel goes back to the evidence

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: OBJ-1 is the highest priority: if an Amendment Agreement changed the leverage or DSCR thresholds, the breach conclusion could be wrong. I must search for any amendment to the 2023 Senior Facilities Agreement before finalizing the memo. OBJ-2 can be addressed afterward by removing unverified ledger citations and relying only on the filing pages that are already in the log.

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: OBJ-1 requires verifying whether Amendment Agreement No. 2 changed the leverage or DSCR thresholds for Q3-2025. The search result shows Amendment No. 2 has a 'Covenant Holiday' clause on page 2 that references Section 7.1(a) and the Measurement Period ending 30 September 2025. I must read the full text of that page to capture the exact amended threshold before concluding on breach.

 "docId": "amendment-2",
 "docTitle": "Amendment Agreement No. 2 — Covenant Holiday",
 "page": 2,
 "heading": "AMENDMENT AGREEMENT NO. 2 — OPERATIVE PROVISIONS",
 "text": "AMENDMENT AGREEMENT NO. 2 — OPERATIVE PROVISIONS\n\nClause 2.1 (Covenant Holiday). Notwithstanding Section 7.1(a) of the Agreement, for the Measurement Periods ending 30 September 2025 and 31 December 2025 only, the Borrower s …[truncated 620 chars]

payload.heading: AMENDMENT AGREEMENT NO. 2 — OPERATIVE PROVISIONS
payload.text:
AMENDMENT AGREEMENT NO. 2 — OPERATIVE PROVISIONS

Clause 2.1 (Covenant Holiday). Notwithstanding Section 7.1(a) of the Agreement, for the Measurement Periods ending 30 September 2025 and 31 December 2025 only, the Borrower shall ensure that the Leverage Ratio does not exceed 4.00:1.00.

Clause 2.2 (Reversion). For each Measurement Period ending on or after 31 March 2026, the ratio in Section 7.1(a) shall revert to 3.50:1.00 without further action of the parties.

Clause 2.3 (Minimum Liquidity Condition). During the period referred to in Clause 2.1, the Borrower shall maintain Cash and Cash Equivalents of not less than EUR 3,000,000, tested on the last day of each Financial Quarter.

Clause 2.4 This Amendment Agreement is a Finance Document and prevails over the Agreement to the extent of any inconsistency.

title: Sentinel reasons
detail: Resolved OBJ-1: Amendment No. 2 page 2 sets leverage threshold to 4.00:1.00 for Q3-2025, so 3.70x is compliant; liquidity floor is EUR 3.0M, EUR 3.8M is compliant. DSCR 2.56x remains compliant per original agreement page 7. Resolved OBJ-2 by citing only pages actually read (credit-agreement-2023 p7, amendment-2 p2, q3-2025-filing p1/p3) and attributing ledger matches to tool results.

title: Redrafting memo
detail: Writing memo from the investigation log

title: Draft memo: EARLY_WARNING
detail: 4 findings · 8/8 citations verified verbatim

payload.title: Covenant Monitoring Memo — Meridian Logistics SA Q3-2025
payload.summary: Q3-2025 leverage is 3.70x, compliant under the amended 4.00:1.00 ceiling for the period. DSCR of 2.56x and liquidity of EUR 3.8M both satisfy covenant requirements. The amended holiday applies only to 30 September and 31 December 2025. Exceptional items—EUR 1.2M litigation settlement and EUR 2.8M revolver-funded capex—drove debt higher. Liquidity headroom is tight against the EUR 3.0M floor.

findings.text: Net debt of EUR 81,400 thousand and LTM EBITDA of EUR 22,000 thousand produce a Leverage Ratio of 3.70x, within the amended 4.00:1.00 ceiling for the Measurement Period ending 30 September 2025.

citations.quote: the Borrower shall ensure that the Leverage Ratio does not exceed 4.00:1.00.
Total net debt: EUR 81,400 thousand

findings.text: Debt Service Coverage is 2.56x, above the 1.25:1.00 minimum.

citations.quote: The Borrower shall ensure that the ratio of Consolidated EBITDA to Debt Service in respect of any Measurement Period is not less than 1.25:1.00.
LTM EBITDA (last twelve months): EUR 22,000 thousand

findings.text: Quarter-end liquidity of EUR 3,800 thousand satisfies the EUR 3,000,000 minimum liquidity condition under the covenant holiday.

citations.quote: the Borrower shall maintain Cash and Cash Equivalents of not less than EUR 3,000,000, tested on the last day of each Financial Quarter.
quarter-end liquidity decreased to EUR 3,800 thousand

findings.text: The EUR 1.2 million Aurora litigation settlement and the EUR 2.8 million Nordvolt fleet purchase, funded by a revolver drawing, are disclosed as exceptional developments.

citations.quote: the Group recognised a EUR 1,200 thousand charge in operating expenses in connection with the final settlement of the Aurora Freight SARL litigation (payment reference LEGAL-SETTLE-0847, August 2025).

the Group accelerated its fleet electrification programme with the purchase of twelve electric trucks and associated charging infrastructure from Nordvolt Fleet Systems for EUR 2,800 thousand (reference EQUIP-PURCH-0912), funded through a drawing under the Revolving Facility in September 2025.

flaggedTransactions.cause: Final settlement of Aurora Freight SARL litigation
Purchase of 12 electric trucks and charging infrastructure from Nordvolt Fleet Systems funded by revolver drawing

payload.recommendation: No covenant breach for Q3-2025. Leverage is compliant at 3.70x against the amended 4.00x ceiling and liquidity meets the EUR 3.0M floor. However, headroom is thin; monitor Q4 recovery, restrict further revolver drawings for non-ordinary capex, and require a Compliance Certificate confirming no further amendment overrides.
